text:
Once upon a time in peaceful Everwood Grove, a brave owl named Olivewood loved adventure. One moonlit night, he whispered secrets Among leaves. His wingscarred tale? Saving squirrels from snakes. Soon, word spread. Olivewood swooped. Snakes recoiled.

People liked Olivewood. So did owls. Their tales swapped.

One day, gossip flew.

"A feathered hero!"

No one knew why.

"I heard."

One owl huffed.

"A tale."

She spun. That's why.

No more secrets kept. Olivewood soared.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
